seo.metaTitle: Digital Services for MSPs & Hosting Companies | Expand Without Building | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Your managed services cover IT — but your SMB customers need marketing, websites, and ecommerce too. Hostopia gives MSPs and hosting companies white-label digital services that expand revenue without expanding your team.

hero.headline: Your Customers Trust You with Their IT. They're Going Somewhere Else for Everything Digital. That Doesn't Have To Continue.
hero.subheadline: 35% of MSPs now cite competition as their biggest challenge — up from 29% last year. The MSPs that are pulling ahead aren't just managing networks better. They're expanding into the digital services their SMB customers are already buying from someone else.
hero.description: Hostopia gives MSPs and hosting companies a white-label portfolio of digital services — AI-powered websites, ecommerce, directory listings, SEO, reputation management, email marketing, and more — that complement your existing managed services without requiring you to build or staff new capabilities.

challenge.heading: The Competition Isn't Just Other MSPs Anymore
challenge.content: The MSP market is consolidating rapidly. 74% of MSPs now prefer fewer vendors to meet technology needs, accelerating M&A that favors larger, diversified providers. Meanwhile, 68% of North American MSPs experienced revenue increases last year, but 35% cite competition as their number one challenge. Hosting companies face a parallel challenge — the infrastructure hosting market is increasingly commoditized. The companies that retain and grow customers are the ones offering value beyond the server.
challenge.callout: Building a website builder, SEO platform, and ecommerce solution in-house would take years and millions. Partnering takes weeks.
sources: Axcient, 2024 Cloud Services MSP Market Trends Report

solution.heading: Complement Managed Services with Digital Growth Tools
solution.intro: Hostopia lets you extend managed IT into your customer's digital presence — websites, marketing, and commerce — without building or staffing new capabilities.

blocks.heading: The 'Digital Extension' Play
blocks.content: Your MSP already manages the customer's network, devices, and security. Hostopia lets you extend that managed relationship into their website, online listings, search visibility, and online reputation. For hosting companies, a customer paying $30/month for hosting is a prime candidate for a $15/month AI website builder, a $20/month SEO tool, and a $25/month directory listings service. Revenue per hosting account can double or triple.

blocks.heading: Solving the 'We Need a Website' Problem
blocks.content: Every MSP has experienced it: a client calls asking for help with their website, Google listing, or online reputation. Hostopia's productized digital services solve this cleanly. Online Presence Builder generates AI-powered sites in minutes. Search Everywhere Optimization provides guided, step-by-step SEO tasks. Reviews Promoter automates review collection and distribution. These aren't projects — they're products with predictable revenue.

blocks.heading: Winning Against Consolidation
blocks.content: As M&A accelerates in the MSP space, the operators being acquired at premium valuations are the ones with diversified, recurring revenue. An MSP generating $100K/month in managed IT plus $40K in digital services is valued differently because the digital revenue represents a distinct customer need that isn't easily displaced.

outcomes.heading: What MSPs & Hosting Companies Achieve with Hostopia

cards.title: Capture Revenue You're Currently Referring Away
cards.body: Every 'we need a website' or 'help us get found online' conversation is revenue walking out the door. Hostopia turns those conversations into product sales.

cards.title: Differentiate in a Crowded Market
cards.body: 35% of MSPs cite competition as their top challenge. Offering digital services that competitors don't gives you a distinct market position.

cards.title: Increase Revenue Per Customer Without Increasing Headcount
cards.body: Hostopia's products are self-serve or low-touch for end users. Your team sells and provisions; the platform delivers.

cards.title: Strengthen M&A Positioning
cards.body: Diversified recurring revenue from digital services increases your company's valuation and attractiveness to acquirers in a consolidating market.

cta.headline: Your SMB Customers Need More Than IT. Be the One Who Delivers It.
cta.body: See how MSPs and hosting companies use Hostopia to add digital services to their managed services portfolio — capturing new revenue, deepening customer relationships, and differentiating in a consolidating market.
